description: CompositionNavy blue boxer shorts from playboy made of 100% cotton, has a soft elasticated waistband, a buttoned pocket at the back and embroidered branding on the left thighWash careMachine wash cold at 40 degrees with like coloursUse only non chlorine bleach when neededTumble dry lowCool ironOnce you experience the superior comfort and cheeky style of Playboy inner wear, there's no going back. Crafted from soft cotton/lycra blend with soft elastic, perfect for your comfort, Playboy has kept your convenience in mind while designing this pair of briefs.
